public_key.description: Optional: existing public key to add

success.description: Whether the key was successfully added

id.description: Populated from map key by client

ApiKeyAuth.description: Bearer token authentication. Provide your API token prefixed with "Bearer ", e.g. "Bearer your-api-token".
ApiKeyAuth.name: Authorization

info.description: This is the Thunder Compute API server for managing compute resources and GPU workloads.
info.title: Thunder Compute API

get.description: Get a list of user's compute instances

post.description: Add an SSH key to an existing instance. If public_key is provided in the request body, it will be added to authorized_keys. If no public_key is provided, a new key pair will be generated and the private key returned.

oneOf.description: Optional: provide an existing public key to add

requestBody.description: Optional: provide an existing public key to add

post.description: Delete a compute instance by ID
Modify a running compute instance's resources
Add a new SSH public key to the authenticated user's organization

get.description: Get a list of all SSH keys for the authenticated user's organization

delete.description: Delete an SSH key by ID

get.description: Retrieve current hourly pricing information for compute resources

post.description: Create a new snapshot from a running instance

get.description: Get a list of all snapshots for the authenticated user's organization
Retrieve GPU spec configurations for all supported GPU types, counts, and modes
Get available thunder templates for instance creation
